name: OneDrive
description: Inspect the signed-in user's OneDrive metadata and browse files and folders without downloading or changing content.

auth.hint: Register an application with Microsoft Entra ID, complete a delegated OAuth 2.0 flow, and provide a Microsoft Graph access token with the Files.Read permission.

tools.name: get_my_drive
tools.description: Retrieve metadata and storage quota information for the signed-in user's default OneDrive.

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated drive properties to return, such as id,name,driveType,webUrl,quota.

tools.name: list_root_children
tools.description: List files and folders directly under the signed-in user's OneDrive root folder.

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated driveItem properties to return, such as id,name,size,file,folder,webUrl.

params.name: $top
params.description: Requested number of driveItems in the response page; the service controls the effective page size.

params.name: $skipToken
params.description: Opaque continuation token for a subsequent page when supplied by Microsoft Graph.

params.name: $orderby
params.description: OData ordering expression supported by the list-children operation.

tools.name: list_item_children
tools.description: List files and folders directly inside a OneDrive folder identified by its driveItem ID.

params.name: item_id
params.description: Unique driveItem identifier of the folder whose children should be listed.

params.name: $top
params.description: Requested number of driveItems in the response page; the service controls the effective page size.

params.name: $skipToken
params.description: Opaque continuation token for a subsequent page when supplied by Microsoft Graph.

params.name: $orderby
params.description: OData ordering expression supported by the list-children operation.
